hunting_loot.name: Ancient Stingray Egg
hunting_loot.description: An egg with a thick, leathery shell and horn-like spines jutting from its corners. Within, a fragile life still stirs faintly.

hunting_loot.name: Cockatrice’s Egg
hunting_loot.description: A deep amethyst egg, flecked with myriad tiny spots, lies before thee. With gentle care and tender affection, ‘tis said the egg may yet be persuaded to hatch.

hunting_loot.name: Cyclops Eye
hunting_loot.description: A colossal ocular relic, a dark souvenir from the realm of one-eyed beings.

hunting_loot.name: Frost Wyvern Egg
hunting_loot.description: Mystical egg, cool to the touch, encapsulating the delicate balance of fragility and resilience.

hunting_loot.name: Giant Bat Hide
hunting_loot.description: A pelt with a velvety texture.

hunting_loot.name: Mermaid Scale
hunting_loot.description: This scale, taken from the body of a dead mermaid, shimmers beautifully in many colors when it catches the light. Yet the cold aura clinging to it leaves an unsettling chill in the air.

hunting_loot.name: White Shark Tooth
hunting_loot.description: A razor-sharp tooth made for rending flesh, its surface still crusted with the flesh and fresh blood of a recently bitten prey.
